evals.prompt: I'm 175 cm tall and weigh 70 kg.
evals.expected_output: Parsed and validated metric measurements: Height 175 cm, Weight 70 kg.
Imperial units converted to metric: Height 182.88 cm, Weight 81.65 kg.
assertions: Height correctly converted from 6 ft to 182.88 cm
Weight correctly converted from 180 lbs to approximately 81.65 kg

evals.expected_output: Invalid height detected - asks user to verify unusual measurement.
assertions: Flags height of 1000 cm as out of normal range
Asks user to confirm or re-enter measurement
Weight of 50 kg accepted as valid
